name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America at 792 Broadway in Chula Vista, CA offers quick payday and title loans for local residents.
description_long:
Located at 792 & 790 Broadway in Chula Vista, CA, this Advance America storefront provides fast cash solutions for residents who need emergency funds. The standalone location is open Monday through Friday from 10AM to 6PM and Saturday from 9AM to 1PM, with Sunday closures. Chula Vista residents and visitors will find the storefront accessible and convenient for urgent financial needs.

The Chula Vista Advance America location specializes in payday loans and title loans, providing options when unexpected expenses arise. Call the store at +1 619-409-1596 to discuss loan options, current rates, and application requirements. The staff can answer your questions about eligibility and help you understand loan terms before you commit.

When visiting, bring a valid ID, recent proof of income (pay stub or bank statement), and proof of a bank account. If you live in Chula Vista and need quick cash without a lengthy process, this location serves the community with straightforward service and fast approval timelines.
pros: Same-day personal loans up to $1,000 available online or in-store
Title loans up to $25,000 for customers with paid-off vehicles
Extended store hours including Saturday (9 a.m.–4 p.m.) and Friday evening (until 6 p.m.)
Bilingual support in Spanish at physical locations
Multiple loan product options (payday, installment, title) to fit different needs
4.9-star rating based on 125,419 verified Google reviews
Fast application process with pre-qualification available by phone
cons: Payday and installment loans are short-term high-cost debt with substantial fees and interest rates
Title loans require vehicle collateral and risk vehicle loss upon default
Loan amounts are capped at $1,000 for unsecured products, requiring title loans for larger sums
Physical store location limits accessibility compared to fully online-only competitors
No mention of affordability programs, financial counseling, or alternatives to repeat borrowing
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs and access to a physical store in Jacksonville or surrounding areas
Vehicle owners needing larger emergency loans ($2,000–$25,000) who can safely manage collateral risk
Spanish-speaking borrowers seeking in-person guidance with bilingual support
Customers without online banking access or who prefer in-person loan processing and verification
diagnosis: Advance America is best for consumers facing immediate cash emergencies who have access to the physical Jacksonville location or can apply online, and who understand and accept high-cost short-term lending terms. The primary caveat is that payday and installment loans are expensive short-term products with high interest rates and fees; title loans risk vehicle loss if unpaid. These should be considered emergency-only solutions, not alternatives to traditional credit.
services: Installment loans ($100–$1,000 with multi-payment repayment options)
Title loans ($2,000–$25,000 secured by vehicle equity)
Extended store hours (weekdays 10 a.m.–6 p.m., Saturday 9 a.m.–4 p.m.)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 792 Broadway, Chula Vista, CA. Fast payday and title loans for emergency cash needs.
